product_overview: Dans Platformu is a dance-focused marketplace and management platform that connects instructors, schools and students to create, sell and attend dance courses and events while tracking progress and communications. The frontend provides authentication, course discovery, and profile management as primary user-facing capabilities.
core_goals: Enable instructors and schools to create, manage and sell dance courses and events
Allow students to discover, register for and track progress in courses
Provide authentication and personalized profiles for users
Offer searchable discovery (courses, instructors, schools) with filters
Support basic instructor / school listings and contact flows
Maintain a simple, scalable frontend structure and routes

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email and password so they can access protected pages (profile and personalized features).
user_flows: Navigate to /signin -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See /profile page
Navigate to /signin -> Leave email or password field empty -> Click Login button to submit -> See validation error message
Navigate to /signin -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field with incorrect credentials -> Click Login button to submit -> See authentication error message

features.name: Sign Up
features.description: Allow new users (students, instructors, schools) to register an account using email and password so they can manage profiles and enroll or create courses.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button -> See /profile page
Navigate to /signup -> Fill email input field with an already-registered email -> Fill password input field -> Click Sign Up button -> See 'email already in use' error message
Navigate to /signup -> Leave required field(s) empty -> Click Sign Up button -> See validation error message

features.name: Explore Courses
features.description: Search and filter the catalog of dance courses to discover classes matched to the user's interests.
user_flows: Navigate to /courses -> Enter search term -> Select filters -> View course list
Navigate to /courses -> Enter search term that returns no matches -> Select filters -> See empty state message and suggestions

features.name: Browse Instructors
features.description: View a list of instructors to discover teaching profiles and contact or follow them.
user_flows: Navigate to /instructors -> View instructor list -> Click instructor card -> See instructor detail view
Navigate to /instructors -> View instructor list -> Encounter network or load error -> See retry option or error message

features.name: Browse Schools
features.description: Discover dance schools, view their offerings and locate their profiles for course or event information.
user_flows: Navigate to /schools -> View schools list -> Click school card -> See school detail view
Navigate to /schools -> Use filters that yield no results -> See empty state and suggestion to broaden filters

features.name: View & Edit Profile
features.description: Authenticated users can view and update their profile details and access personalized content.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile (authenticated) -> See profile details -> Click Edit button -> Update profile fields -> Click Save -> See updated profile details
Navigate to /profile (unauthenticated) -> Observe redirect to /signin -> Fill email and password -> Click Login button to submit -> See /profile page

features.name: Home / Landing
features.description: Public landing page that introduces the platform and provides entry points to sign in, sign up or browse content.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See landing content and calls-to-action -> Click Sign Up button -> Navigate to /signup
Navigate to / -> See landing content -> Click Explore Courses -> Navigate to /courses

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
